chain_edges.notes: Existing codesigned exclusives (MS-OpenAI, Amazon-Anthropic) are the very contracts the focal prediction expects to see publicly amended.
Capital-coupling lock-in pressure is the precondition the AGI-clause unwind responds to by converting capability triggers into calendar-bound caps.
AI-capex ROI reset and tech-stock pressure push hyperscalers to restructure frontier-lab anchor deals into calendar-bound revenue caps.

relations.notes: Same hyperscaler-frontier-lab contract cluster: af6 sees 5-pole exclusivity lock-in, focal sees one contract publicly amended toward multi-cloud.
Both treat hyperscaler-lab capital coupling but disagree on direction: 24c expects compute-stack lock-in, focal expects at least one unwind to multi-cloud.
81d focuses on three-cloud oligopoly for training capacity; focal focuses on contract-clause restructuring within those alliances.
Different facets of the frontier-lab commercialization arc: closed-weights re-expansion vs contract-clause unwind toward multi-cloud distribution.
